data.title: J.McLaughlin's holiday fête on Lexington Avenue hosted by Selby Drummond, Will Kahn & Walker Ward in support of Monday Night Hospitality.
data.description: On the evening of December 5, 2025, J.McLaughlin marked the start of the holiday season at its flagship store on Lexington Avenue in New York. The event was a festive celebration hosted by Selby Drummond, Will Kahn, and influencer Walker Ward. Walker Ward made a grand entrance dressed as Santa in a unique toile suit. The event garnered attention due to this unusual arrival and set a joyful tone for the holiday season.

data.title: SentinelOne's stock dropped after beating earnings but missing guidance; revenue was $258.91M, earnings per share 7 cents.
data.description: Cybersecurity company SentinelOne reported third-quarter adjusted earnings of 7 cents per share, beating expectations of 5 cents per share, and generated $258.91 million in revenue, exceeding the consensus target of $257.7 million. Total revenue saw a 23% increase from the previous year, with customers bringing in $100,000 or more annually growing by 20% to 1,572. However, guidance for the fourth quarter fell short as the company projected sales to reach around $271 million, disappointing analysts expecting $273.09 million, leading to a significant drop in S stock. Despite management's emphasis on growing demand for their AI-native security platform, shareholders focused on the underwhelming guidance, causing a 7% and 13% decline in afterhours and open-market sessions, respectively. The volatility in the stock following the guidance miss showcases the concept of heteroskedasticity, where events trigger price fluctuations and uncertain outcomes, but volatility eventually stabilizes. The situation presents an opportunity for speculators looking forward to potential upsides in the future.

data.title: Mr. Drain Plumbing in Sacramento concludes successful "Flush Away Hunger" food drive, rallying support for families in need.
data.description: In Sacramento, California on December 5, 2025, Mr. Drain Plumbing has joyfully declared the positive conclusion of its first-ever Flush Away Hunger canned food drive. This initiative brought together customers and employees in a competition to aid families during the Thanksgiving season.

data.title: Richmond American Homes of Tennessee, Inc. acquires 191 new homesites at Hickory Pointe in Dickson, TN for flexible floor plans.
data.description: A builder in DICKSON, Tenn., known for its flexible floor plans catering to different lifestyles, Richmond American Homes of Tennessee, Inc., a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc., recently acquired and finalized the purchase of 191 homesites on Dec. 5, 2025.

data.title: USCB Financial Holdings sells $44.6M portfolio to boost profits and EPS growth.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. revealed that it had sold $44.6 million worth of available-for-sale securities (AFS). This move by the holding company for U.S. Century Bank was made to enhance future earnings, boost earnings per share (EPS), and bolster overall profitability.

data.title: ORIC Pharmaceuticals grants 69,200 stock options and 11,400 restricted stock units to 3 new employees in Nov 2025.
data.description: South San Francisco, California, and San Diego witnessed an announcement from ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ORIC) on December 5, 2025. The clinical stage oncology firm, dedicated to creating treatments combating therapeutic resistance mechanisms, revealed the granting of 69,200 non-qualified stock options and 11,400 restricted stock units on December 1, 2025. These were awarded to three fresh non-executive employees hired by ORIC in November 2025.

data.title: Parsons chosen to lead $441 million I-70 Rocheport to Columbia project in Missouri, teaming up with Emery Sapp & Sons.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Parsons Corporation revealed that they had been chosen by the Missouri Highways and Transportation Commission to work on the Interstate 70 Rocheport to Columbia Design-Build project. This project will be carried out in partnership with Emery Sapp & Sons (ESS). Parsons Corporation, listed under NYSE as PSN, will spearhead the project alongside ESS, showcasing their combined expertise and capabilities in delivering high-quality infrastructure projects. This selection marks a significant milestone for both companies and highlights their commitment to improving transportation infrastructure in Missouri.

data.title: Fulcrum Therapeutics grants stock options to one new employee under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: FULC) based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in developing small molecules for rare genetic diseases, revealed the granting of non-statutory stock options to a new employee. This move involved granting stock options for purchasing company common stock, as per the 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan. This action was taken as an inducement to facilitate the new employee's recruitment to Fulcrum, aligning with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Global Mofy AI Limited raises $4.8M through private placement financing; engages in generative AI and digital asset development.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Beijing-based Global Mofy AI Limited (Global Mofy), listed on Nasdaq under GMM, unveiled that it has secured agreements with investors to conduct a private placement of its securities. The company is a provider of generative AI technology solutions focusing on virtual content production and 3D digital asset development for the wider digital content sector. The private placement, known as securities purchase agreements (SPAs), is expected to generate around US$4.8 million in gross proceeds for Global Mofy, subject to deductions for professional fees and other offering costs.

data.title: Fermi America signs Electric Service Agreement with SPS, securing up to 200 MW power capacity in Amarillo, Texas.
data.description: In Amarillo, Texas, on December 5, 2025, Fermi America™ made public their agreement with Southwestern Public Service Company (SPS), a subsidiary of Xcel Energy, to supply a maximum of 200 megawatts (MW) of electrical capacity. This signed Electric Service Agreement (ESA) is a definitive step forward for Fermi America™ (listed on Nasdaq & LSE as FRMI) in their partnership with SPS.

data.title: S&P 500 close to record high, Dow Jones gains momentum, Samsara sees big move after earnings.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index is gaining momentum in the afternoon on Friday. Samsara is making a significant move following its earnings report. The S&P 500 is approaching its record high once again. Additionally, a beauty stock is breaking out in today's trading session. Stay updated with live coverage on the latest market developments.
White House official: “The President met with the President of Mexico and the Prime Minister of Canada”

data.title: Teamsters rally against SkyHop Global CEO outside Palm Beach County Convention Center; exposing abuses.
data.description: Today in West Palm Beach, Florida, members of Teamsters Local 210 and Skyhop Global drivers distributed flyers outside the Palm Beach County Convention Center. The purpose was to expose the abuses of Skyhop CEO, with important details being shared with the public. This event took place on December 5, 2025.
BRAZIL STOCKS SLUMP MOST SINCE 2021 ON BOLSONARO SON CANDIDACY

data.title: FCPT buys Baptist Health property for $4.7M in Alabama. Newly constructed, net-leased facility with a long-term lease.
data.description: A real estate investment trust, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), has acquired a newly constructed Baptist Health property in Alabama for $4.7 million. The property is situated in a robust retail area and is operated by the corporation under a long-term, net lease agreement with around ten years remaining. FCPT focuses on owning and acquiring high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties, with this recent acquisition adding to their portfolio.

data.title: Essex Property Trust declares a $2.57 quarterly dividend per common share, payable on Jan 15, 2026 to shareholders of record as of Jan 2, 2026.
data.description: Essex Property Trust, Inc., a real estate investment trust (REIT) listed on NYSE as ESS, disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $2.57 per common share. This dividend will be payable on January 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 2, 2026. Essex Property Trust, Inc. is an S&P 500 company that specializes in acquiring, developing, redeveloping, and managing multifamily residential properties.

data.title: SMJ International Holdings Inc. completes US$10 Million IPO, offering 2.5M shares at US$4 each. (Total shares issued: 10M)
data.description: SMJ International Holdings Inc., a premium flooring specialist based in Singapore, recently closed its firm commitment initial public offering (the “Offering”). The company distributed 2,500,000 Class A ordinary shares with a par value of US$0.0002 per share. The public offering price was set at US$4.00 per share. SMJ offers a variety of premium flooring products under its proprietary “SMJ” brand in Asian markets.

data.title: Private employers shed 32,000 jobs in November, with pay growth at 4.4% YoY. Fed may consider easing policies.
data.description: Encouraging the Federal Reserve toward easing, the latest data from ADP paints a concerning picture. Instead of modest gains, private employers cut 32,000 positions in November, with pay growth slowing to 4.4% annually. "Hiring has been inconsistent due to cautious consumers and economic uncertainty. This November slowdown was widespread, specifically impacting small businesses," stated ADP's chief economist. Looking at the broader context, the Conference Board's labor differential, showing sentiments on job availability, has been decreasing steadily, following a typical late-cycle pattern of reduced hiring, weakened wage growth, and declining optimism. This trend is consistent with the current economic phase. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson's INLEXZO (gemcitabine intravesical system) yields 74% disease-free survival at 1 year in NMIBC, with 95% progression-free & 92% avoiding bladder removal. Limited options for patients.
data.description: Results from Cohort 4 of the SunRISe-1 study reveal that over 95% of patients did not experience disease progression within the first year, while more than 92% did not require bladder removal. Individuals with this form of bladder cancer face limited treatment options beyond radical cystectomy, emphasizing the positive impact of the study's findings.

data.title: Grand Falls-Windsor terminates Local 1349 President for participating in elections; CUPE NL criticizes move.
data.description: In Grand Falls-Windsor, NL, CUPE Newfoundland and Labrador President Sherry Hillier criticized the town for firing an employee due to her involvement in local elections, after the town issued a notice to bargain. Hillier emphasized that every citizen in Grand Falls-Windsor has the right to engage in local elections, even while employed by the town. This action has sparked controversy over employee rights and political participation, raising concerns about fairness and democratic principles.
